understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a character through a grid-based series of levels, completing each level by matching and stepping on all goal cells. Each goal cell requires the character's carried piece to have a specific shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and the ultimate objective is to complete all levels without running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The character moves on a grid and carries a piece with three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). The grid contains modifier tiles that alter these attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. To activate a goal cell, the piece must exactly match that goal's required shape, color, and rotation. The character loses stamina with each move, and depleting all stamina results in the loss of a life; losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan a route to adjust attributes at modifier tiles before reaching the goal, avoiding unnecessary movements to conserve stamina. The state of the piece persists across moves, so sequences of modifier tiles can be used to achieve the needed attribute combination.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a character through a grid-based series of levels, completing each level by matching and stepping on all goal cells. Each goal cell requires the character's carried piece to have a specific shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and the ultimate objective is to complete all levels without running out of lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The character moves on a grid and carries a piece with three attributes: shape, color, and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270°). The grid contains modifier tiles that alter these attributes when stepped on: shape modifiers cycle the shape, color modifiers cycle the color, and rotation modifiers rotate the piece 90° clockwise. To activate a goal cell, the piece must exactly match that goal's required shape, color, and rotation. The character loses stamina with each move, and depleting all stamina results in the loss of a life; losing all lives ends the game. The player must plan a route to adjust attributes at modifier tiles before reaching the goal, avoiding unnecessary movements to conserve stamina. The state of the piece persists across moves, so sequences of modifier tiles can be used to achieve the needed attribute combination.
